name: SQLite JSON Ingest
description: Discover all JSON data files in a directory tree, infer schema, create a SQLite database, and ingest all records. Designed for post-scrape consolidation — no LLM needed, pure code.

sourceDir.description: Root directory to scan for JSON files (recursively)

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database to create/append to

assumptions: JSON files contain arrays of objects or single objects
